questions.question:
Read the schedule.
Mon 19:00 basketball
Tue 20:00 guitar
Wed 19:00 math support
Question: Why can't Selim join chess club on Wednesday?
options: Ek Soru 1 — He has math support class.
Ek Soru 1 — He plays guitar on Wednesday.
Ek Soru 1 — He is on holiday.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Programda Çarşamba saatinde math support dersi var.

[GitHub Ek Test — Teen Life]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the conversation.
Can: Would you like to come to the concert?
Bora: I'd love to, but I have to finish my project.
Question: Bora is ...
options: Ek Soru 1 — refusing politely with a reason
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — "I'd love to, but..." nazik reddetme kalıbıdır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Teen Life]

questions.question:

Question: Which study style is described?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Düzenli çalışma-dinlenme döngüsü planlı çalışmayı gösterir.

questions.question:

Ek Soru 1 — Sorunun nedeni geç uyuma ve gece ekran kullanımıdır.

questions.question:
Read the survey.
63% prefer team projects, 28% pair work, 18% individual tasks.
Question: Which conclusion is correct?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Most students prefer individual work.
Ek Soru 1 — Team projects are most popular.
Ek Soru 1 — Pair work is chosen by all.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — En yüksek oran team projects seçeneğindedir.

Ek Soru 1 — She has no phone.

questions.question: Ek Soru 1 — Which shows a current action?

Ek Soru 1 — I never eat fast food.

Ek Soru 1 — Is cooking now = şu an.
